ab: Hnuya su sa miyah?
en: A: How did you get here?

ab: Mnksa ku.
en: I came on foot.

ab: Pnapa su tdruy manu ka miyah?
en: A: What kind of car did you take?

ab: Pnapa ku tdruy bahu.
en: B: I came by bus.

ab: Huya su sa musa pnrhulan?
en: A: How do you go to church?

ab: Seapa ku na tdruy tama mu.
en: B: Dad drove me with him.

ab: Hnuya msa musa ptasan kdjiyax ka hiya?
en: A: How does he usually go to school?

ab: Peapa tdruy gmtuq elug ka musa ptasan.
en: B: He took the subway to school.

ab: Hnuya msa musa marig pajiq ka payi su?
en: A: How does your grandmother go to the grocery store?

ab: Pneapa tdruy pupuk gakat musa marig pajiq ka hiya.
en: B: She went to the grocery store on a motorcycle.

ab: Huya su msa musa ka alang Ran-yig?
en: A: How are you going to get to Orchid Island?

ab: Peapa ku asu ka musa Ranyig.
en: B: I want to take a boat to Lanyu.

ab: Huya msa musa Ran-yig ka hiya?
en: A: How did he get to Orchid Island?

ab: Pneapa asu skiya musa Ranyig ka hiya.
en: B: He took a plane to Orchid Island.

ab: Peapa tdruy manu musa Takaw ka hiya?
en: A: What bus did he take to Kaohsiung?

ab: Peapa tdruy qrngul pstlaway musa Takaw ka hiya.
en: B: He took the THSR to Kaohsiung.

ab: Pnapa tdruy qrngul musa Tayto ka hiya hug?
en: A: Did he take a train to Taitung?

ab: Kiya,pnapa tdruy qrngul musa Tayto ka hiya.
en: B: Yes, he took a train to Taitung.

ab: Pnapa tdruy qrngul musa Tayto ka hiya hug?
en: A: Did he take a train to Taitung?

ab: Aji,Pnapa asu skiya musa Tayto ka hiya.
en: B: No, he took a plane to Taitung.

ab: Niqan ppaan tdruy bahu ka dalih hini hug?
en: A: Is there a bus stop near here?

ab: Niqan,slagu su mksa do qtaun su ka pepaan tdruy bahu da.
ch: B:有，往前走就會看到公車站了。
en: B: Yes, if you go straight ahead, you will see the bus stop.

ab: Sdalih bi pyaan tdruy gmtuq elug o quri inu hug?
ch: A:離這裡最近的捷運站在哪裡?
en: A: Where is the nearest MRT station?

ab: Ungat pyaan tdruy gmtuq elug ka hini, asi su ka peapa tdruy qapi.
ch: B:這裡沒有捷運站，你只能坐計程車。
en: B: There is no MRT station here, you can only take a taxi.

ab: Khnu qbsiyaqan pdhuq ptasan ka peapa ta tdruy bahu hug?
en: A:How long does it take to get to the school by bus?

ab: Maxal rima spngan tuki ka pdhuq ptasan.
en: B:15 minutes to school.

ab: Khnu qbsyaqan pdhuq Tayciyu ka peapa ta tdruy qrngul pstlaway hug?
ch: A:搭高鐵要多久時間會到臺中?
en: A: How long does it take to get to Taichung by THSR?

ab: Kingal iyax tuki ka pdhuq Tayciyu.
en: B: I will come to Taichung in an hour.

ab: Mgriq tdruy musa U-ray o bsiyaq hug?
en: A: Is it a long drive to Ulai?

ab: Yaa bi kingal iyax tuki.
en: B: It takes about an hour.

ab: Khnu qbsyaqan peapa su tdruy gmtuq elug ka miyah su sapah mu hug?
ch: A:你搭捷運來我家要多久?
en: A: How long did it take you to come to my house by subway?

ab: Empusal spngan tuki.
en: B: It takes 20 minutes.

ab: Mkla su peapa tdruy gakat hug?
en: A: Do you know how to ride a bicycle?

ab: Mkla ku peapa tdruy gakat ka yaku.
en: B: I can ride a bicycle.

ab: Niqan tdruy pupuk gakat su hug?
en: A: Do you have a motorcycle?

ab: Niqan kingal tdruy pupuk gakat mu ka yaku.
en: B: I have a motorcycle.

ab: Niqan tdruy pupuk gakat su hug.
en: A: Do you have a motorcycle?

ab: Ungat tdruy pupuk gakat mu ka yaku.
en: B: I don't have a motorcycle.
